title: eupatorium pumilum
intro: Eupatorium pumilum, also known as White Snakeroot, is a perennial plant native to North America with small white flowers and a hairy stem. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues. Eupatorium pumilum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
